archetype.name: Shadowdancer
archetype.note: This archetype offers Cognitive Loophole at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Cognitive Loophole
feat.requirement: You are currently affected by a mental effect
feat.special: You can use this reaction even if the mental effect is preventing you from using reactions.
feat.text: You can find a loophole in a mental effect to temporarily overcome it. Until the end of your next turn, you ignore a single mental effect. You can suppress a particular effect using Cognitive Loophole only once. You can’t use Cognitive Loophole to suppress an effect you chose to have affect you.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
